raw_consumer_statement:
I canceled my gym membership in person in XX/XX/year>, but the business continued to charge my Amex card. I reached out to the owner multiple times, immediately after the charges, and was told it was a mistake, and he promised to refund the money. 

By the time I formally disputed the charges, Amex declined to help because it was more than 60 days since the charge. I acted in good faith and tried to resolve the issue with the merchant, which is what Amex instructed me to do! 

These charges were unauthorized, and Amex has denied assistance based on a technicality. Im requesting that Amex reopen the dispute or credit the charges as a resolution, consistent with their consumer protection standards.
